    logger.go:42: 23:14:35 | myapp-active-test-cr | 2026-04-23 23:14:09 +0200 CEST	Normal	Widget.widget.example.io e2e-widget-cr-test		SuccessfulWidgetApply	successful create / updated widget for cr my-operator-system/e2e-widget-cr-test	example-widget-controller
    logger.go:42: 23:14:35 | myapp-active-test-cr | 2026-04-23 23:14:10 +0200 CEST	Warning	Widget.widget.example.io e2e-widget-cr-test		WidgetNotReady	widget status not ready for cr my-operator-system/e2e-widget-cr-test	example-widget-controller
